2606.15015.title: NEXUS: Neural Energy Fields for Physically Consistent Contact-Rich 3D Object Dynamics
2606.15015.paper_summary: Physics-grounded video generation requires controllable 3D object dynamics that remain physically consistent under contact, deformation, and external forcing. Existing trajectory-based methods often model isolated physical effects, making it difficult to compose conservative and non-conservative dynamics in contact-rich 3D scenes. We present NEXUS, a neural energy-field framework for contact-rich 3D object dynamics. NEXUS represents each object as a structural graph and constructs dynamic object-object and object-environment contact graphs. Inspired by Hamiltonian Neural Networks, NEXUS formulates motion through scalar energy and dissipation terms rather than directly predicting states or accelerations. Conservative effects, including gravity and elastic deformation, are composed as additive energy terms, while non-conservative effects such as damping and impact-induced energy loss are modeled with learned Rayleigh-style dissipation. Forces are derived by differentiating the energy and dissipation functions and rolled out with a multi-substep semi-implicit integrator. Across controlled trajectory benchmarks, NEXUS improves long-horizon accuracy over representative learned and physics-structured dynamics baselines under varying mechanical properties and physical-effect compositions. We further show that NEXUS trajectories provide effective guidance for contact-rich video generation, improving physical plausibility while maintaining competitive visual quality.
2606.15015.paper_summary_zh: 物理基礎的視頻生成需要可控的 3D 物體動力學，這些動力學在接觸、變形和外部作用下保持物理一致性。現有的基於軌跡的方法通常模型化孤立的物理效應，使得在接觸豐富的 3D 場景中組合保守和非保守動力學變得困難。我們提出了 NEXUS，一個用於接觸豐富的 3D 物體動力學的神經能量場框架。NEXUS 將每個物體表示為結構圖，並構建動態物體-物體和物體-環境接觸圖。受哈密頓神經網絡的啟發，NEXUS 通過標量能量和耗散項來公式化運動，而不是直接預測狀態或加速度。保守效應，包括重力和彈性變形，被組合為加性能量項，而非保守效應如阻尼和衝擊引起的能量損失則通過學習的雷利風格耗散來建模。力是通過對能量和耗散函數進行微分而得出，並使用多子步半隱式積分器進行展開。在受控的軌跡基準測試中，NEXUS 在不同機械特性和物理效應組合下，改善了長期準確性，超越了代表性的學習和物理結構動力學基線。我們進一步顯示，NEXUS 軌跡為接觸豐富的視頻生成提供了有效的指導，提高了物理合理性，同時保持了競爭的視覺質量。
2606.15015.author: Qizhen Ying et.al.
2606.15015.authors: Qizhen Ying, Guangming Wang, Yangchen Pan, Victor Adrian Prisacariu, Yixiong Jing
